stdout:
**Acceptance Criteria**
No blocking findings.

- REQ-01 is met: `risk` is registered as a built-in kind in [item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:523), included in defaults at [item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:1017), and covered by CLI integration test [risk_kind_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/risk_kind_tests.rs:79).
- REQ-02 is met: `mitigates` and `resolves` are registered at [item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:102), with resolution tests at [risk_kind_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/risk_kind_tests.rs:140) and [risk_kind_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/risk_kind_tests.rs:172).
- REQ-03 is met: indexing remains a projection over issue markdown through the generic path at [item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:837), and the no-parallel-store behavior is tested at [risk_kind_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/risk_kind_tests.rs:204).
- REQ-04 is met by the stored `cargo-ci` gate for issue `be3eb6ca`: `fmt`, `clippy`, and tests passed with `2416 passed, 0 failed, 12 ignored` in `.jit/gate-runs/5b1df472-e3ed-4c72-bdac-4d1087f381e5/result.json`.

**Prior Review Feedback**
`run_history` is empty for this issue. No unresolved prior code-review items.

**Architecture**
No boundary violations found. The change is in the domain model only: constants, `ItemKind::risk_default`, and default-kind resolution in [item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:84). Storage remains behind `IssueStore`; CLI behavior is exercised through tests without moving output or parsing concerns into domain code.

**Functional Paradigm**
No concerning imperative drift. The implementation follows existing iterator-based registry resolution and indexing patterns, including sorted default resolution at [item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:1017) and generic extraction at [item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:861).

**Correctness And Invariants**
No invariant regressions found. This change introduces no file writes, state transitions, assignee handling, label validation, or PID handling. Label namespaces remain structured as `namespace:value`, and qualified item labels resolve through the existing generic link path in [item.rs command code](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs:318).

**Safety**
No unsafe code introduced. The existing `cargo-ci` gate includes clippy and passed.

**Testing**
Coverage is adequate and focused:
- CLI list behavior: [risk_kind_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/risk_kind_tests.rs:79)
- Both link namespaces: [risk_kind_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/risk_kind_tests.rs:140)
- Markdown-only source of truth: [risk_kind_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/risk_kind_tests.rs:204)

I did not rerun cargo tests because the issue has a succeeded `cargo-ci` gate. I did run `./scripts/jit-validate.sh`; it passed.

**Error Handling**
No new fallible I/O or unchecked library `unwrap()` paths were introduced. `risk_default()` returns `Result<Self, ItemError>` and uses the existing `ItemKind::from_config` validation path at [item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:555).

**CLI Contract**
No new command was added. Existing `jit item list --kind risk --json` behavior is covered at [risk_kind_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/risk_kind_tests.rs:91).

**Documentation**
Public function documentation for `ItemKind::risk_default` includes description and an example at [item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:523). Existing default-kind docs were updated to include `risk` at [item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:995).

**Jit Issue Management**
Dependencies are complete: both prerequisite issues in the prompt are `done`. `./scripts/jit-validate.sh` passed. The issue’s `cargo-ci` gate is passed and `code-review` is the remaining pending gate.

VERDICT: PASS
